ddls:
CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "creator_description" TEXT /* Description or bio of the creator */,
  "creator_url" TEXT /* URL to the creator's main page (e.g., YouTube channel, Twitch profile) */,
  "creator_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the creator */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the creator is active (e.g., YouTube, Twitch) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the creator joined the platform */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the creator */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre or category of content */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the creator is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "youtube_metrics" (
  "creator_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers on YouTube */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views on YouTube */,
  "recent_median_view_count" INTEGER /* Recent median view count for YouTube videos */,
  "recent_highest_view_count" INTEGER /* Recent highest view count for YouTube videos */,
  "recent_highest_viewed_video_url" TEXT /* URL to the most viewed YouTube video */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate calculated as (likes + comments) / views */,
  "average_view_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration in seconds that viewers watch the creator's videos */,
  "monthly_growth_rate" REAL /* Monthly growth rate of subscribers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitch_metrics" (
  "creator_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers on Twitch */,
  "recent_median_view_count" INTEGER /* Recent median view count for Twitch videos */,
  "recent_highest_view_count" INTEGER /* Recent highest view count for Twitch videos */,
  "recent_highest_viewed_video_url" TEXT /* URL to the most viewed Twitch video */,
  "average_view_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration in seconds that viewers watch the creator's streams */,
  "monthly_growth_rate" REAL /* Monthly growth rate of followers */,
  "average_concurrent_viewers" INTEGER /* Average number of concurrent viewers during streams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creator_profiles" (
  "creator_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the creator's profile image */,
  "bio_short" TEXT /* Short bio or description */,
  "bio_long" TEXT /* Detailed bio or description */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "DOB" TEXT /* Date of birth of the creator */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the creator */,
  "content_language" TEXT /* Primary language used in the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The last date the user logged into the platform */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's email is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "creator_id" TEXT /* ID of the creator being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)
